content:
Looking for a BEGINNER-friendly gamedev vibe coding tutorial?

I got you. 

Let's building this 2D pirate beat 'em up game from SCRATCH.

→ Codex App
→ GPT 5.5
→ Images 2.0
→ Phaser 4
→ ElevenLabs

Step-by-step... prompt-by-prompt...

Starter project + resources in reply 👇

00:00 1. Intro
01:16 2. Project Structure
01:34 3. `public` folder
02:29 4. .Agent skills
03:00 5. Codex App
04:15 6. Running the game
05:32 7. Better Testing Setup
06:59 8. Generate Background Art
08:56 9. Use parallel sub-agents
10:22 10. Create an Asset Index
13:27 11. Adding the Pirate Player
15:58 12. Browser Testing in Codex
17:55 13. Add Skeleton Enemy
19:44 14. Collisions & Hitboxes
21:04 15. Adding Debug
22:12 16. Fixing Attack Frames
24:06 17. Fixing Hit Boxes and Bounds
26:10 18. Adding Health System & Bars
27:52 19. Game Over And Death Flow
28:46 20. Wave Progression System
31:38 21. Restarting The Game
33:49 22. Generated Sound & Music with AI
39:14 23. Adding juice and polish
41:54 Wrap Up
